SOURCE: 15297298.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (15297298.pdf)
SUMMARY: Strategic, motivational, and solutions-focused leader with an MBA. Extensive experience in analyzing systems/processes and implementing mission-critical infrastructure improvements. Broad-based healthcare industry experience including regulatory/corporate compliance, strategic planning, and contract negotiations.
SKILLS: Windows 2000/XP/7, Novell NetWare 4.x/5.x/6.x, EMR (Allscripts and McKesson), TCP/IP Enterprise Networks, Enterprise Virus Protection, Asset Management/ITIL, Arcserve/Backup Exec/Net Backup, Symantec Ghost, Cable Installation/Management, LANDesk, Window Server 2000/2003/2008, HIPAA/HITEC, CCNA, Cisco Certified Network Associate (CCAI), ITIL Foundations Certification, Sniffer Distributed Training Certified, Certified Novell Administrator (CNA 5.1)

COMPANY: Company Name, City, State

DESCRIPTION: Develop annual planning, budgeting, and productivity levels for corporate accounting. Prepare detailed business and financial activity reports. Improved top line growth by 39.4%. Responsible for cost containment, cash control/banking, asset protection, loss prevention, inventory management, Federal and DEA compliance.
